name: hermes-zh-switcher
description: Chinese/English UI switcher installer for Hermes Desktop.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/install.mjs && node --check scripts/uninstall.mjs && node --check scripts/verify.mjs && node --check scripts/update-hermes.mjs && node --check scripts/check-dictionary.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-bundle.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/safety-check.mjs && node --check dist/hermes-zh-ui.js && node scripts/check-dictionary.mjs
